title: 札幌記念の後に・Home Straight

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having finished the Sapporo Kinen, Fine Motion
and Air Groove compliment each other's efforts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I receive a phone call from Fine Motion's older
sister, who thanks me for getting Fine Motion to
share her true feelings.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the airport, we're met with a flood of fans who
have caught wind of Fine Motion's plan to return
home. She tells them she hopes they'll watch her
final race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Knowing that her next race could be her last ever,
I narrow it down to four options.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While it's technically possible to enter all four
races, the time for Fine Motion to decide which
one she should run at the peak of her career
draws near...
